positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunrise, rendered in a flat, retro vaporwave style. The foreground features stylized, interconnected mountain peaks forming an abstract pattern. Use a limited color palette of deep cobalt blue, neon coral pink, and warm yellow gradient wash for the sky. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed as a repeating, high-contrast seamless pattern suitable for textile printing. Isolated elements, vector art quality, perfect clean lines, negative space is crucial. Crisp, high-detail graphic design.
